id.title: id
id.description: Only return resources that belong to this id.

ids.title: ids
ids.description: Defines the ids to query for.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: The unique identifier of the organization the project belongs to.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the project creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the project (e.g. creation, activation, deactivation).

state.title: state
state.description: Describes the current state of the project.

projectRoleAssertion.title: project_role_assertion
projectRoleAssertion.description: Describes if the roles of the user should be added to the token.

authorizationRequired.title: authorization_required
authorizationRequired.description: When enabled, ZITADEL will check if a user has appropriate role assignments to use this project when they log into an application of this project.

projectAccessRequired.title: project_access_required
projectAccessRequired.description: When enabled, ZITADEL will check if the organization of the user, that is trying to log in, has access to this project (either owns the project or is granted).

privateLabelingSetting.title: private_labeling_setting
privateLabelingSetting.description: Defines from where the private labeling should be triggered.

grantedOrganizationId.title: granted_organization_id
grantedOrganizationId.description: The ID of the organization the project is granted to.

grantedOrganizationName.title: granted_organization_name
grantedOrganizationName.description: The name of the organization the project is granted to.

grantedState.title: granted_state
grantedState.description: Describes the current state of the granted project.

organizationId.title: organization_id
organizationId.description: The unique identifier of the organization which granted the project to the granted_organization_id.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the granted project creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the granted project (e.g. creation, activation, deactivation).

grantedOrganizationId.title: granted_organization_id
grantedOrganizationId.description: The ID of the organization the project is granted to.

grantedOrganizationName.title: granted_organization_name
grantedOrganizationName.description: The name of the organization the project is granted to.

grantedRoleKeys.title: granted_role_keys
grantedRoleKeys.description: The roles of the granted project.

projectId.title: project_id
projectId.description: The ID of the granted project.

projectName.title: project_name
projectName.description: The name of the granted project.

state.title: state
state.description: Describes the current state of the granted project.

projectName.title: project_name
projectName.description: Defines the name of the project to query for.

method.title: method
method.description: Defines which text comparison method used for the name query.

creationDate.description: The timestamp of the project role creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the project role.

displayName.title: display_name
